text:
(a) The traffic safety fund account is an account in the general revenue fund. Money received from any source to implement this chapter shall be:

(1) deposited to the credit of the traffic safety fund account; and

(2) spent with other state money spent to implement this chapter in the manner in which the other state money is spent.

(b) A payment from the traffic safety fund account shall be made in compliance with this chapter and rules adopted by the governor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 723. Tex. Traffic Safety Act
##### § 723.003 — Traffic Safety Fund Account

(a) The traffic safety fund account is an account in the general revenue fund. Money received from any source to implement this chapter shall be:

    (1) deposited to the credit of the traffic safety fund account; and

    (2) spent with other state money spent to implement this chapter in the manner in which the other state money is spent.

(b) A payment from the traffic safety fund account shall be made in compliance with this chapter and rules adopted by the governor.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.162, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

deposited to the credit of the traffic safety fund account; and
spent with other state money spent to implement this chapter in the manner in which the other state money is spent.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A payment from the traffic safety fund account shall be made in compliance with this chapter and rules adopted by the governor.
